200.description: Paginated list of properties matching the search criteria

schema.description: Paginated search result returned by GET /developer/search

items.description: Property as it appears in search results — a lightweight representation with the key fields needed for listing cards

property_place_slug.description: Name of the place / destination area

total_guest.description: Maximum number of guests the property sleeps

min_price.description: Lowest available price per week in GBP

price_per_night.description: Price per night in GBP (for nightly-priced properties)

thumbnailUrl.description: URL of the main thumbnail image

search_summary.description: Short summary shown in search result cards
search_summary.example: A charming thatched cottage with stunning views across Porlock Vale to the Bristol Channel.

rating.description: Average review rating (when included by the search service)

items.title: PropertySummary

properties.description: Array of properties matching the search criteria

total_property_on_search.description: Total number of properties matching the search (before pagination)

perpage.description: Number of properties returned per page

property_place_type.description: Place types available for filtering (used by the frontend facets)

filter_array_values.description: Applied filter values for the current search

search_query_string.description: Serialised search query parameters as a JSON string

property_booking_nights.description: Number of booking nights that was searched

property_guests.description: Number of guests that was searched

propertyRating.description: Property ratings keyed by property ID

marker_array.description: JSON string of map marker coordinates for the result set

schema.title: SearchResult

403.description: Invalid API key, IP not whitelisted, or origin not allowed

schema.description: Standard error response returned by all endpoints when a request fails (4xx/5xx)

statusCode.description: HTTP status code indicating the type of error

message.description: Human-readable error message, or an array of validation error strings for 422 responses

error.description: Short error label matching the HTTP status text

schema.title: Error

429.description: Rate limit exceeded — check Retry-After header

schema.description: Error response returned when a client exceeds their configured rate limit

retryAfter.description: Number of seconds the client should wait before retrying

schema.title: RateLimitError
